user.title: Villa GW
user.description: Connect to your HHG/EGB Villa GW. Default web credentials are admin/admin.

data.enable_log_tail: Enable Telnet log-tail (faster, but requires open telnet)
data.enable_mqtt_bridge: Enable MQTT bridge (publish events to HA Mosquitto)
data.enable_mqtt_discovery: Publish MQTT-Discovery configs (auto-creates entities — disable when using the custom-component)
data.enable_cloud: Enable iLifestyle Cloud SIP listener (recommended — needed for instant ring detection)

cloud.title: iLifestyle Cloud account
cloud.description: Use the same email/password you registered in the iLifestyle phone app. Home Assistant will register as an additional Cloud endpoint so doorbell rings are delivered in parallel with your phone. The binding code is optional — leave empty unless your device-owner specifically gave you one.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Villa GW at that address
error.invalid_auth: Web admin login rejected — check username/password
error.cloud_cannot_connect: Cannot reach the iLifestyle Cloud — check your internet connection
error.cloud_invalid_auth: Cloud login rejected — check your iLifestyle account email/password
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see Home Assistant logs

abort.already_configured: This Villa GW (same MAC) is already configured

cloud.title: iLifestyle Cloud account
cloud.description: Use the same email/password you registered in the iLifestyle phone app. Home Assistant will register as an additional Cloud endpoint so doorbell rings are delivered in parallel with your phone. The binding code is optional — leave empty unless your device-owner specifically gave you one.

error.cloud_cannot_connect: Cannot reach the iLifestyle Cloud — check your internet connection
error.cloud_invalid_auth: Cloud login rejected — check your iLifestyle account email/password
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see Home Assistant logs

wake.name: Wake live view
wake.description: Start a silent live-view session — the outdoor camera turns on without ringing.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Seconds the live-view should stay active.

address.name: Outdoor address
address.description: Bus address of the outdoor station.

stop_live.name: Stop live view
stop_live.description: End the current silent live-view session.

address.name: Outdoor address
address.description: Bus address of the outdoor station.

unlock_door.name: Unlock door
unlock_door.description: Open the door relay via the bus.

hangup.name: Hang up
hangup.description: End any active call or live-view session.

switch_camera.name: Switch camera
switch_camera.description: Cycle through outdoor stations (useful only with multiple).

snapshot.name: Snapshot
snapshot.description: Request a single MJPG snapshot from the camera.

send_at_command.name: Send raw AT+B command
send_at_command.description: Power-user: send an arbitrary AT+B command directly to one of the gateway's internal daemons.

command.name: AT+B command
command.description: Full command string, must start with 'AT+B'.

expect_response.name: Expect response
expect_response.description: Wait for and return any reply.
